subcodes.first_line: O thou sagacious and swift enquirer! Arise thou unto the heights of divine wisdom, then enter thou therein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها السائل البارع السارع فاصدع الی معارج الحکم الربانیه ثم ادخل فی
subcodes.subjects: @degrees of spirit and the kingdoms of existence, @the human soul, @spirit of faith [ruh-i-'iman], @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @The Primal Will; self-generation of the Primal Will, @station of the Manifestation of God, @The Holy Spirit, @soul; spirit after death, @the animal kingdom
